nl_query: Show the complete timeline for each board created last month: creation date, first script assignment date, first evaluation attempt start date, first freeze date, last submission date, and the total number of days the board has been open.
failed_sql: SELECT b.id, b.created_at, MIN(sa.assigned_at) AS first_script_assignment_date, MIN(ea.started_at) AS first_evaluation_attempt_start_date, MIN(ea.frozen_at) AS first_freeze_date, MAX(ea.submitted_at) AS last_submission_date, (MAX(ea.submitted_at) - b.created_at) AS days_open FROM board b JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.board_id = b.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.board_id = b.id WHERE b.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month' GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT 200;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.board_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
